_description: Wraith: The Oblivion Character Sheet Template - All fields needed for database integration
template_usage: Fill this template and import with: php tools/repeatable/php/database-tools/import_wraith_characters.php path/to/this_file.json (or ?file=filename.json in browser). character_name is required. All keys map to wraith_characters table. See reference/Characters/Wraiths/README_wraith_template.md for field-to-table mapping.

_field_documentation.id: INTEGER - Auto-increment primary key (set to 0 for new characters)
_field_documentation.user_id: INTEGER - ID of user who owns this character (0 = system/NPC)
_field_documentation.legion_at_death: STRING - Legion at time of death
_field_documentation.date_of_death: DATE - ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when character died
_field_documentation.timeline.notable_mortal_past: STRING - Notable events in mortal life
_field_documentation.traits.Physical: ARRAY - Array of physical trait strings
_field_documentation.traits.Social: ARRAY - Array of social trait strings
_field_documentation.traits.Mental: ARRAY - Array of mental trait strings
_field_documentation.negativeTraits: OBJECT - Negative/damaging traits by category (same structure as traits)
_field_documentation.abilities_format: Array of objects: [{"name": "Occult", "category": "Mental", "level": 4, "specialization": "Necromancy"}] OR Array of strings: ["Performance (Voice) 4", "Subterfuge 2"]
_field_documentation.specializations_format: Object with ability names as keys: {"Performance": "Voice", "Occult": "Necromancy"}
_field_documentation.fetters_format: Array of objects: [{"name": "Family Home", "rating": 3, "description": "Childhood home in Phoenix"}]
_field_documentation.passions_format: Array of objects: [{"passion": "Protect my family", "rating": 5}, {"passion": "Revenge on my killer", "rating": 3}]
_field_documentation.backgroundDetails_format: Object with name:description pairs: {"Memories": "Vivid memories of family life", "Status": "Respected member of the Guild"}
_field_documentation.willpower_current: INTEGER - Current willpower (can be lower than permanent)
_field_documentation.shadow.dark_passions: ARRAY - Array of dark passion objects
_field_documentation.shadow.shadow_traits: ARRAY - Array of shadow trait strings
_field_documentation.harrowing.last_harrowing_date: DATE - ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of last harrowing
_field_documentation.harrowing.harrowing_history: ARRAY - Array of harrowing event objects
_field_documentation.custom_data: OBJECT - Custom data (null if not used)
_field_documentation.actingNotes: TEXT - Notes for acting/directing this character
_field_documentation.agentNotes: TEXT - Notes for AI agent interaction with this character
_field_documentation.experience_unspent: INTEGER - Unspent experience points (should equal experience_total - spent_xp)
_field_documentation.shadow_xp_total: INTEGER - Total shadow experience points earned
_field_documentation.shadow_xp_spent: INTEGER - Total shadow experience points spent
_field_documentation.shadow_xp_available: INTEGER - Unspent shadow experience points (should equal shadow_xp_total - shadow_xp_spent)
_field_documentation.created_at: TIMESTAMP - ISO 8601 date-time when character was created (auto-set by database)
_field_documentation.updated_at: TIMESTAMP - ISO 8601 date-time when character was last updated (auto-set by database)

fetters.name: Family Home
fetters.description: Childhood home in Phoenix where family still lives

fetters.name: Wedding Ring
fetters.description: Ring from marriage, kept by widow

backgroundDetails.Memories: Vivid memories of family life and career
backgroundDetails.Status: Respected member of the Guild of Artificers
backgroundDetails.Allies: Small network of wraiths in Phoenix area

thorns.name: Envy
thorns.description: Feels intense jealousy of the living

artifacts.name: Soulforged Blade
artifacts.description: A blade forged from the essence of a wraith's passion
